title: COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION - 211info
text: COLUMBIA PACIFIC CCO COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Columbia Pacific CCO is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, substance use disorder treatment, mental health care, and non-emergency medical transportation for health care visits covered by the CCO. Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Columbia Pacific CCO Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 488-2822 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 298-2101 GOBHI Behavioral Health (503) 488-2822 Main phone (855) 722-8206 TTY Main phone (503) 488-2822 TTY/TTD 711 Toll-free (855) 722-8206 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop, Columbia, and Tillamook Counties Services: Dental Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Eye Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Mental Health Evaluation * Medicaid Recipients Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Medicaid Recipients Pain Management * Medicaid Recipients Physician Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Specialized Information and Referral * Medicaid Recipients Substance Use Disorder Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
